2604.11662.title: Hidden Failures in Robustness: Why Supervised Uncertainty Quantification Needs Better Evaluation
2604.11662.paper_summary: Recent work has shown that the hidden states of large language models contain signals useful for uncertainty estimation and hallucination detection, motivating a growing interest in efficient probe-based approaches. Yet it remains unclear how robust existing methods are, and which probe designs provide uncertainty estimates that are reliable under distribution shift. We present a systematic study of supervised uncertainty probes across models, tasks, and OOD settings, training over 2,000 probes while varying the representation layer, feature type, and token aggregation strategy. Our evaluation highlights poor robustness in current methods, particularly in the case of long-form generations. We also find that probe robustness is driven less by architecture and more by the probe inputs. Middle-layer representations generalise more reliably than final-layer hidden states, and aggregating across response tokens is consistently more robust than relying on single-token features. These differences are often largely invisible in-distribution but become more important under distribution shift. Informed by our evaluation, we explore a simple hybrid back-off strategy for improving robustness, arguing that better evaluation is a prerequisite for building more robust probes.
2604.11662.paper_summary_zh: 最近的研究顯示，大型語言模型的隱藏狀態包含對不確定性估計和幻覺檢測有用的信號，這引發了對高效探測器方法日益增長的興趣。<lb/>然而，目前尚不清楚現有方法的穩健性如何，以及哪些探測器設計能在分佈變化下提供可靠的不確定性估計。<lb/>我們對各種模型、任務和OOD設置下的監督不確定性探測器進行了系統研究，訓練了超過2000個探測器，同時變化表示層、特徵類型和標記聚合策略。<lb/>我們的評估突顯了當前方法的穩健性差，特別是在長篇生成的情況下。<lb/>我們還發現，探測器的穩健性與架構的關係較小，更受探測器輸入的驅動。<lb/>中層表示的泛化能力比最終層的隱藏狀態更可靠，並且在響應標記上進行聚合的穩健性始終高於依賴單一標記特徵。<lb/>這些差異在分佈內通常不明顯，但在分佈變化下變得更加重要。<lb/>根據我們的評估，我們探索了一種簡單的混合回退策略以提高穩健性，並認為更好的評估是構建更穩健探測器的前提。
2604.11662.author: Joe Stacey et.al.
2604.11662.authors: Joe Stacey, Hadas Orgad, Kentaro Inui, Benjamin Heinzerling, Nafise Sadat Moosavi
